variants: Kyriakos Anastasakis is a graduate of Mossy Hollow College, where he focused on the principles of astrostatic engineering. He holds an Astrostatic Engineer Permit, showcasing his professional competence in the field. Outside of his engineering career, Kyriakos actively gives back to the community as the Garden Program Coordinator Spruce Spring, working on sustainable gardening initiatives. He also shares his expertise through publications in the Quietbrook Chapbook Series. Proficient in Burmese script, he effectively incorporates this language in various aspects of his work.
